nodes.name: Pomatorhinus
nodes.summary: Pomatorhinus（Pomatorhinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如红嘴钩嘴鹛、Brown-crowned scimitar babbler、棕头钩嘴鹛等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Brown-crowned scimitar babbler
nodes.summary: The brown-crowned scimitar babbler (Pomatorhinus phayrei) is a species of bird in the family Timaliidae. It is found in Bhutan, India, Myanmar, Thailand, Laos, Vietnam, and China. Its natural habitat is subtropical moist montane forest. References
